verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, when You placed Your hands upon me I knew that I would never be the same For in that moment, I became your servant And since that day, I only have one aim

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My soul desire is to be used An empty vessel longing to be filled by You My soul desire is to serve You, Lord To do your perfect will To work each day and build Your Kingdom This is my soul desire.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, I do not seek to claim the glory I only wish to be under Your control For I know that You alone are worthy And it's You who placed this longing in my soul
